epigraph.quote: Charles + Jenny had an interview with Father Nick who says they may get married at Belmont Abbey. Hooray!

moments.quote: Fishermen arrived at 7 the next morning. lots of them came & we saw one catch a big fish.

moments.place: Moor End Farm, Ashperton, Herefordshire, UK
moments.quote: Freya met us & we walked up to the yurt.
Charles put on a clean, very creased shirt & covered it up with a jacket.
